title: John 3:16 — God So Loved the World

scenes.narration: There is one sentence in the Bible that changed everything. Sixteen words. And every single one matters.
scenes.image_prompt: An open Bible with a single glowing verse radiating golden light, peaceful and reverent atmosphere, bright colorful illustration

scenes.narration: For God so loved the world.
scenes.image_prompt: The Earth glowing warmly in space, surrounded by soft golden light, peaceful and beautiful, colorful hopeful storybook illustration

scenes.narration: Not some of it. Not the good parts. The whole world. Every person. Including you.
scenes.image_prompt: Children from many different backgrounds all standing together in a sunny meadow, arms around each other, warm golden light shining on all of them, bright joyful colorful illustration

scenes.narration: That He gave His one and only Son.
scenes.image_prompt: Baby Jesus in a manger, glowing with warm golden light, Mary and Joseph watching lovingly, a bright star shining above, colorful gentle bible storybook illustration

scenes.narration: That was the gift. Not gold. Not power. His own Son. That's how much you are loved.
scenes.image_prompt: God's gentle hands lowering a glowing baby wrapped in light down toward the Earth, warm golden colors, deeply loving and tender colorful illustration

scenes.narration: That whoever believes in Him shall not perish.
scenes.image_prompt: A person standing at a crossroads, one path dark and stormy, the other bright and glowing, choosing the lit path, colorful hopeful bible storybook art

scenes.narration: Not some people. Not the perfect people. Whoever. That word includes you — exactly as you are.
scenes.image_prompt: Many different kinds of people walking together on a bright golden path toward a glowing light, joyful and colorful family-friendly bible illustration
Beautiful golden city beyond a glowing gate, warm light streaming out, people walking joyfully toward it, birds flying, peaceful and hopeful colorful storybook art

scenes.narration: Not just life after death — but life that starts right now. A life full of meaning, love, and purpose.
scenes.image_prompt: A family laughing together in a sunlit garden, children playing, parents smiling, God's warm light shining down on them, bright joyful colorful storybook illustration

scenes.narration: For God so loved the world. For God so loved... you.
scenes.image_prompt: A child looking up at the sky, arms outstretched, warm golden light from above surrounding them completely, beautiful peaceful colorful bible storybook art
